name: plan reviewer primary prompt requires explicit execution-shape confirmation
contains: You must confirm the declared execution shape and echo it in the required `executionShape` field of your structured output.
Assess execution readiness explicitly across these dimensions: scope granularity, verification concreteness, and resume safety.
Use blocking severity for missing information or plan structure that would prevent neal from executing safely.
Treat leftover planning-task scaffolding as blocking.
Read /tmp/REVIEW.md before finalizing findings so you can inspect prior review history and coder responses.
excludes: candidate recovery plan, not as a brand-new top-level initiative
